recommendations.rationale: Tencent bounced modestly in a still-weak trend, so the setup is not strong enough for a fresh swing entry yet.
evidence: Price closed at 493.2, up 0.653% on the day.
Latest close remains below the 20-day MA of 509.5 and the 60-day MA of 545.1083.
60-day range position is only 0.0766, showing it is still trading near the lower end of its recent range.
Volume ratio versus 20-day average is 0.6852, so the bounce lacked strong participation.
Regime flag is downtrend.
risks: Weak-volume rebound can fail quickly inside a broader downtrend.
Internet-platform sentiment may stay fragile if sector leadership does not broaden.
recommendations.invalidation: Upgrade only if price reclaims the 20-day moving average with stronger-than-average volume; avoid the setup if it breaks back below 486.2 and stays in the lower 10% of its 60-day range.

recommendations.rationale: Alibaba showed the strongest one-day move among the stocks, but it is still below key moving averages and the rebound came on light volume.
evidence: Price closed at 124.5, up 1.055% on the day, the strongest stock move in the snapshot.
Latest close is still below the 20-day MA of 125.76 and well below the 60-day MA of 144.2467.
60-day range position is 0.1091, meaning it remains near the lower end of its recent range.
Volume ratio versus 20-day average is only 0.5577.
Regime flag is downtrend.
risks: A leader on a weak tape can still fail if follow-through does not appear within a few sessions.
Low participation suggests the move may be short covering rather than genuine accumulation.
recommendations.invalidation: A stronger long setup appears only if price closes above the 20-day moving average with improving volume; the watch thesis weakens if price loses 123.2 and momentum stalls again.

recommendations.rationale: Xiaomi remains one of the weakest charts in the group, with price near the bottom of its 60-day range and no sign of conviction behind the bounce.
evidence: Price closed at 30.88, up 0.718% on the day.
Latest close is below the 20-day MA of 32.742 and the 60-day MA of 34.4147.
60-day range position is just 0.0301, the weakest in the watchlist.
Volume ratio versus 20-day average is 0.5371, indicating low participation.
Regime flag is downtrend.
risks: Deeply oversold names can squeeze sharply even before the trend improves.
Consumer-tech beta can rebound fast if market risk appetite broadens further.
recommendations.invalidation: Avoid stance is invalidated if price reclaims the 20-day moving average and moves materially off the bottom of its 60-day range on stronger volume; until then, weakness below 30.44 confirms the bearish setup.

recommendations.rationale: The broad-market ETF has the healthiest technical profile in the list, sitting above its 20-day average in a range regime, but it has not yet cleared the 60-day trend filter.
evidence: Price closed at 26.2, up 0.924% on the day.
Latest close is above the 20-day MA of 25.663.
Latest close is still slightly below the 60-day MA of 26.435.
60-day range position is 0.431, much stronger than the tech names.
Regime flag is range rather than downtrend.
risks: Failure near the 60-day moving average could turn the range setup back into a rejection.
Broad-market strength may lag if tech weakness resumes.
recommendations.invalidation: Hold remains valid while price stays above the 20-day moving average; downgrade if it loses 25.663 decisively, and upgrade only if it closes above the 60-day moving average with follow-through.

recommendations.rationale: Hang Seng Tech ETF is still in a downtrend, but the liquid ETF structure and above-average volume make it the better vehicle to monitor for sector confirmation.
evidence: Price closed at 4.75, up 0.55% on the day.
Latest close is just below the 20-day MA of 4.7564 and below the 60-day MA of 5.1172.
60-day range position is 0.1639, still weak but better than the weakest single stocks.
Volume ratio versus 20-day average is 1.103, the only clear above-average participation in the list.
Regime flag is downtrend.
risks: Sector ETFs can remain trapped below trend even with one strong volume day.
If leading constituents fail, ETF confirmation may disappear quickly.
recommendations.invalidation: Watch thesis improves only if price reclaims the 20-day moving average and starts to build above it; a drop back through 4.702 would confirm the downtrend remains in control.

recommendations.rationale: iShares Hang Seng TECH ETF tracks the same weak sector setup as 3033.HK but with less convincing volume, so it stays on watch rather than becoming an active candidate.
evidence: Price closed at 10.2, up 0.791% on the day.
Latest close is just below the 20-day MA of 10.2095 and below the 60-day MA of 10.9698.
60-day range position is 0.1595, showing it remains near the lower part of its recent range.
Volume ratio versus 20-day average is 0.6132, weaker than 3033.HK.
Regime flag is downtrend.
risks: Lower participation reduces confidence in any breakout attempt.
Tech-sector weakness could persist even in a short-term risk-on tape.
recommendations.invalidation: A more constructive stance requires a close above the 20-day moving average with stronger volume; continued inability to hold above 10.1 would keep the downtrend intact.
